Parameters.Description: List of Scope Tags for this Entity instance.

Parameters.Name: AppsBlockClipboardSharing
Parameters.Description: Block clipboard sharing between apps (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: AppsBlockCopyPaste
Parameters.Description: Block copy and paste functionality.

Parameters.Name: AppsBlockYouTube
Parameters.Description: Block YouTube (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: AppsHideList
Parameters.Description: Specify the apps that will be hidden on the device. Users cannot discover or run these apps.

Parameters.Name: AppsInstallAllowList
Parameters.Description: Specify the apps that users can install. Users will not be able to install apps that are not on the list.

Parameters.Name: AppsLaunchBlockList
Parameters.Description: Specify the apps that users cannot run on their device.

Parameters.Name: BluetoothBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block Bluetooth (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: CameraBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block use of camera

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockDataRoaming
Parameters.Description: Block data roaming over the cellular network (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockMessaging
Parameters.Description: Block SMS/MMS messaging functionality (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockVoiceRoaming
Parameters.Description: Block voice roaming over the cellular network (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockWiFiTethering
Parameters.Description: Block Wi-Fi tethering (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: CompliantAppListType
Parameters.Description: Device compliance can be viewed in the Restricted Apps Compliance report.

Parameters.Name: CompliantAppsList
Parameters.Description: Enter the Google Play Store URL of the app you want. For example, to specify the Microsoft Remote Desktop app for Android, enter https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.microsoft.rdc.android. To find the URL of an app, use a search engine to locate the store page. For example, to find the Remote Desktop app, you could search Microsoft Remote Desktop Play Store.

Parameters.Name: DateAndTimeBlockChanges
Parameters.Description: Block user from changing date and time on device (Samsung KNOX).

Parameters.Name: DeviceSharingAllowed
Parameters.Description: Allow multiple users to log into the Company Portal using their AAD credentials (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: DiagnosticDataBlockSubmission
Parameters.Description: Block submitting diagnostic data from device.

Parameters.Name: FactoryResetBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block factory reset on device.

Parameters.Name: GoogleAccountBlockAutoSync
Parameters.Description: Block Google account auto sync functionality on device.

Parameters.Name: GooglePlayStoreBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block Google Play store (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: KioskModeApps
Parameters.Description: Kiosk mode apps

Parameters.Name: KioskModeBlockSleepButton
Parameters.Description: Kiosk mode block sleep button

Parameters.Name: KioskModeBlockVolumeButtons
Parameters.Description: Kiosk mode block volume buttons

Parameters.Name: LocationServicesBlocked
Parameters.Description: Location services blocked

Parameters.Name: NfcBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block Near Field Communication (NFC) technology (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockFingerprintUnlock
Parameters.Description: Block using fingerprint to unlock device.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockTrustAgents
Parameters.Description: Block Smart Lock or other trust agents from adjusting lock screen settings (Samsung KNOX Standard 5.0+).

Parameters.Name: PasswordExpirationDays
Parameters.Description: Number of days until device password must be changed. (1-365)

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumLength
Parameters.Description: Minimum number of digits or characters in password. (4-16)

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeScreenTimeout
Parameters.Description: Maximum minutes of inactivity until screen locks. Ignored by device if new time is longer than what's currently set on device. If set to Immediately, devices will use the minimum possible value per device.

Parameters.Name: PasswordPreviousPasswordBlockCount
Parameters.Description: Number of new passwords that must be used until an old one can be reused.

Parameters.Name: PasswordRequired
Parameters.Description: Require password to access device.

Parameters.Name: PasswordRequiredType
Parameters.Description: Specify the type of password required.

Parameters.Name: PasswordSignInFailureCountBeforeFactoryReset
Parameters.Description: Number of consecutive times an incorrect password can be entered before device is wiped of all data.

Parameters.Name: PowerOffBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block user from powering off device. If this setting is disabled the setting 'Number of sign-in failures before wiping device' does not function.

Parameters.Name: RequiredPasswordComplexity
Parameters.Description: Define the password complexity.

Parameters.Name: ScreenCaptureBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block capturing contents of screen as an image.

Parameters.Name: SecurityRequireVerifyApps
Parameters.Description: Security require verify apps

Parameters.Name: StorageBlockGoogleBackup
Parameters.Description: Block sync with Google backup.

Parameters.Name: StorageBlockRemovableStorage
Parameters.Description: Block removable storage usage (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: StorageRequireDeviceEncryption
Parameters.Description: Require encryption on device. Not all devices support encryption.

Parameters.Name: StorageRequireRemovableStorageEncryption
Parameters.Description: Storage cards must be encrypted. Not all devices support storage card encryption. For more information, see the device and mobile operating system documentation.

Parameters.Name: VoiceAssistantBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block voice assistant (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: VoiceDialingBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block voice dialing (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Name: WebBrowserBlockAutofill
Parameters.Description: Block autofill.

Parameters.Name: WebBrowserBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block web browser on device.

Parameters.Name: WebBrowserBlockJavaScript
Parameters.Description: Block JavaScript in the browser.

Parameters.Name: WebBrowserBlockPopups
Parameters.Description: Block pop-ups in web browser.

Parameters.Name: WebBrowserCookieSettings
Parameters.Description: Allow or block browser cookies

Parameters.Name: WiFiBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block Wi-Fi (Samsung KNOX Standard 4.0+).

Parameters.Description: Represents the assignment to the Intune policy.

Parameters.Name: endDay
Parameters.Description: The day of the end date of the freeze period. Valid values 1 to 31.

Parameters.Description: The month of the end date of the freeze period. Valid values 1 to 12.

Parameters.Description: The day of the start date of the freeze period. Valid values 1 to 31.

Description: This resource configures an Intune Device Configuration Policy Android Device Owner.

Parameters.Name: Id
Parameters.Description: The Id of the policy.

Parameters.Name: DisplayName
Parameters.Description: The display name of the policy.

Parameters.Name: Description
Parameters.Description: The description of the policy.

Parameters.Name: RoleScopeTagIds
Parameters.Description: List of Scope Tags for this Entity instance.

Parameters.Name: AccountsBlockModification
Parameters.Description: Block modification of accounts. Only supported on Dedicated devices.

Parameters.Name: AppsAllowInstallFromUnknownSources
Parameters.Description: When allowed, users can enable the 'unknown sources' setting to install apps from sources other than the Google Play Store.

Parameters.Name: AppsAutoUpdatePolicy
Parameters.Description: Devices check for app updates daily. The default behavior is to let device users decide. They'll be able to set their preferences in the managed Google Play app.

Parameters.Name: AppsDefaultPermissionPolicy
Parameters.Description: Define the default permission policy for requests for runtime permissions.

Parameters.Name: AppsRecommendSkippingFirstUseHints
Parameters.Description: Enable a suggestion to apps that they skip their user tutorials and any introductory hints when they first start up, if applicable.

Parameters.Name: AzureAdSharedDeviceDataClearApps
Parameters.Description: A list of managed apps that will have their data cleared during a global sign-out in AAD shared device mode. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: BluetoothBlockConfiguration
Parameters.Description: Block configuring Bluetooth.

Parameters.Name: BluetoothBlockContactSharing
Parameters.Description: Block access to work contacts from another device such as a car system when an Android device is paired via Bluetooth.

Parameters.Name: CameraBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block all cameras on the device

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockWiFiTethering
Parameters.Description: Block tethering and access to portable hotspots.

Parameters.Name: CertificateCredentialConfigurationDisabled
Parameters.Description: Blocks users from making any changes to credentials associated with certificates associated with certificates assigned to them.

Parameters.Name: CrossProfilePoliciesAllowCopyPaste
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not text copied from one profile (personal or work) can be pasted in the other.

Parameters.Name: CrossProfilePoliciesAllowDataSharing
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether data from one profile (personal or work) can be shared with apps in the other profile.

Parameters.Name: CrossProfilePoliciesShowWorkContactsInPersonalProfile
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not contacts stored in work profile are shown in personal profile contact searches/incoming calls.

Parameters.Name: DataRoamingBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block data roaming.

Parameters.Name: DateTimeConfigurationBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block user from manually setting the date and time.

Parameters.Name: DetailedHelpText
Parameters.Description: Represents the customized detailed help text provided to users when they attempt to modify managed settings on their device.

Parameters.Name: DeviceOwnerLockScreenMessage
Parameters.Description: Represents the customized lock screen message provided to users when they attempt to modify managed settings on their device.

Parameters.Name: EnrollmentProfile
Parameters.Description: Represents the enrollment profile type.

Parameters.Name: FactoryResetBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block factory resetting from settings.

Parameters.Name: FactoryResetDeviceAdministratorEmails
Parameters.Description: Email addresses of device admins for factory reset protection. When a device is factory reset, it will require that one of these admins log in with their Google account to unlock the device. If none are specified, factory reset protection is not enabled.

Parameters.Name: GlobalProxy
Parameters.Description: Proxy is set up directly with host, port and excluded hosts.

Parameters.Name: GoogleAccountsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Blocking prevents users from adding their personal Google account to their device.

Parameters.Name: KioskCustomizationDeviceSettingsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether a user can access the device's Settings app while in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskCustomizationPowerButtonActionsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Whether the power menu is shown when a user long presses the Power button of a device in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskCustomizationStatusBar
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether system info and notifications are disabled in Kiosk Mode

Parameters.Name: KioskCustomizationSystemErrorWarnings
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether system error dialogs for crashed or unresponsive apps are shown in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskCustomizationSystemNavigation
Parameters.Description: Indicates which navigation features are enabled in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeAppOrderEnabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to enable app ordering in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeAppPositions
Parameters.Description: The ordering of items on Kiosk Mode Managed Home Screen. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeApps
Parameters.Description: A list of managed apps that will be shown when the device is in Kiosk Mode. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeAppsInFolderOrderedByName
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to alphabetize applications within a folder in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeBluetoothConfigurationEnabled
Parameters.Description: Enable end-users to configure and pair devices over Bluetooth.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeDebugMenuEasyAccessEnabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to allow a user to easy access to the debug menu in Kiosk Mode

Parameters.Name: KioskModeExitCode
Parameters.Description: The 4-6 digit PIN will be the code an IT administrator enters on a multi-app dedicated device to pause kiosk mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeFlashlightConfigurationEnabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to allow a user to use the flashlight in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeFolderIcon
Parameters.Description: Folder icon configuration for managed home screen in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeGridHeight
Parameters.Description: Number of rows for Managed Home Screen grid with app ordering enabled in Kiosk Mode. Valid values 1 to 9999999.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeGridWidth
Parameters.Description: Number of columns for Managed Home Screen grid with app ordering enabled in Kiosk Mode. Valid values 1 to 9999999.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeIconSize
Parameters.Description: Icon size configuration for managed home screen in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeLockHomeScreen
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to lock home screen to the end user in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedFolders
Parameters.Description: A list of managed folders for a device in Kiosk Mode. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenAutoSignout
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to automatically sign-out of MHS and Shared device mode applications after inactive for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenInactiveSignOutDelayInSeconds
Parameters.Description: Number of seconds to give user notice before automatically signing them out for Managed Home Screen. Valid values 0 to 9999999.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenInactiveSignOutNoticeInSeconds
Parameters.Description: Number of seconds device is inactive before automatically signing user out for Managed Home Screen. Valid values 0 to 9999999.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenPinComplexity
Parameters.Description: Complexity of PIN for sign-in session for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenPinRequired
Parameters.Description: Whether or not require user to set a PIN for sign-in session for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenPinRequiredToResume
Parameters.Description: Whether or not required user to enter session PIN if screensaver has appeared for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenSignInBackground
Parameters.Description: Custom URL background for sign-in screen for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenSignInBrandingLogo
Parameters.Description: Custom URL branding logo for sign-in screen and session pin page for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedHomeScreenSignInEnabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not show sign-in screen for Managed Home Screen.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeManagedSettingsEntryDisabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to use single app kiosk mode or multi-app kiosk mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeMediaVolumeConfigurationEnabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to allow a user to change the media volume in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeScreenOrientation
Parameters.Description: Screen orientation configuration for managed home screen in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeScreenSaverConfigurationEnabled
Parameters.Description: Start screen saver when the device screen times out or locks.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeScreenSaverDetectMediaDisabled
Parameters.Description: Whether or not the device screen should show the screen saver if audio/video is playing in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeScreenSaverDisplayTimeInSeconds
Parameters.Description: The number of seconds that the device will display the screen saver for in Kiosk Mode. Valid values 0 to 9999999

Parameters.Name: KioskModeScreenSaverImageUrl
Parameters.Description: URL for an image that will be the device's screen saver in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeScreenSaverStartDelayInSeconds
Parameters.Description: The number of seconds the device needs to be inactive for before the screen saver is shown in Kiosk Mode. Valid values 1 to 9999999

Parameters.Name: KioskModeShowAppNotificationBadge
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to display application notification badges in Kiosk Mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeShowDeviceInfo
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to allow a user to access basic device information.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeUseManagedHomeScreenApp
Parameters.Description: Whether or not to use single app kiosk mode or multi-app kiosk mode.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeVirtualHomeButtonEnabled
Parameters.Description: Enable IT administrators to temporarily leave multi-app kiosk mode to make changes on the device.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeVirtualHomeButtonType
Parameters.Description: Enable a soft-key button that returns users to the Managed Home Screen. Choose between a persistent, floating button or a button activated by a swipe-up gesture.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeWallpaperUrl
Parameters.Description: Customize the appearance of the screen background for assigned groups.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeWifiAllowedSsids
Parameters.Description: The restricted set of WIFI SSIDs available for the user to configure in Kiosk Mode. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: KioskModeWiFiConfigurationEnabled
Parameters.Description: Enable end-users to connect to different Wi-Fi networks.

Parameters.Name: MicrophoneForceMute
Parameters.Description: Block unmuting the microphone and adjusting the microphone volume.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherConfigurationEnabled
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to you want configure Microsoft Launcher.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherCustomWallpaperAllowUserModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not the user can modify the wallpaper to personalize their device.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherCustomWallpaperEnabled
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to configure the wallpaper on the targeted devices.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherCustomWallpaperImageUrl
Parameters.Description: Indicates the URL for the image file to use as the wallpaper on the targeted devices.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherDockPresenceAllowUserModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not the user can modify the device dock configuration on the device.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherDockPresenceConfiguration
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not you want to configure the device dock.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherFeedAllowUserModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not the user can modify the launcher feed on the device.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherFeedEnabled
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not the user can modify the launcher feed on the device.

Parameters.Name: MicrosoftLauncherSearchBarPlacementConfiguration
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not you want to configure the device dock.

Parameters.Name: NetworkEscapeHatchAllowed
Parameters.Description: Whether the network escape hatch is enabled. If a network connection can't be made at boot time, the escape hatch prompts the user to temporarily connect to a network in order to refresh the device policy. After applying policy, the temporary network will be forgotten and the device will continue booting. This prevents being unable to connect to a network if there is no suitable network in the last policy and the device boots into an app in lock task mode, or the user is otherwise unable to reach device settings.

Parameters.Name: NfcBlockOutgoingBeam
Parameters.Description: Block usage of NFC to beam data from apps.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockKeyguard
Parameters.Description: Disable lock screen

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockKeyguardFeatures
Parameters.Description: These features are accessible to users when the device is locked. Users will not be able to see or access disabled features.

Parameters.Name: PasswordExpirationDays
Parameters.Description: Number of days until device password must be changed. (1-365)

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumLength
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum length of the password required on the device. Valid values 4 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumLetterCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of letter characters required for device password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumLowerCaseCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of lower case characters required for device password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumNonLetterCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of non-letter characters required for device password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumNumericCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of numeric characters required for device password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumSymbolCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of symbol characters required for device password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumUpperCaseCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of upper case letter characters required for device password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeScreenTimeout
Parameters.Description: Maximum time after which the device will lock. Can disable screen lock as well so that it never times out.

Parameters.Name: PasswordPreviousPasswordCountToBlock
Parameters.Description: Enter the number of unique passwords required before a user can reuse an old one. (1-24)

Parameters.Name: PasswordRequiredType
Parameters.Description: Set the password's complexity requirements. Additional password requirements will become available based on your selection.

Parameters.Name: PasswordRequireUnlock
Parameters.Description: Indicates the timeout period after which a device must be unlocked using a form of strong authentication.

Parameters.Name: PasswordSignInFailureCountBeforeFactoryReset
Parameters.Description: Number of consecutive times an incorrect password can be entered before device is wiped of all data. (4-11)

Parameters.Name: PersonalProfileAppsAllowInstallFromUnknownSources
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether the user can install apps from unknown sources on the personal profile.

Parameters.Name: PersonalProfileCameraBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether to disable the use of the camera on the personal profile.

Parameters.Name: PersonalProfilePersonalApplications
Parameters.Description: Policy applied to applications in the personal profile. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: PersonalProfilePlayStoreMode
Parameters.Description: Used together with PersonalProfilePersonalApplications to control how apps in the personal profile are allowed or blocked

Parameters.Name: PersonalProfileScreenCaptureBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether to disable the capability to take screenshots on the personal profile.

Parameters.Name: PlayStoreMode
Parameters.Description: Users get access to all apps, except the ones you've required uninstall in Client Apps. If you choose 'Not configured' for this setting, users can only access the apps you've listed as available or required in Client Apps.

Parameters.Name: ScreenCaptureBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block screen capture

Parameters.Name: SecurityCommonCriteriaModeEnabled
Parameters.Description: Represents the security common criteria mode enabled provided to users when they attempt to modify managed settings on their device.

Parameters.Name: SecurityDeveloperSettingsEnabled
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not the user is allowed to access developer settings like developer options and safe boot on the device.

Parameters.Name: SecurityRequireVerifyApps
Parameters.Description: Enable Google Play Protect to scan apps before and after they're installed. If it detects a threat, it might warn the user to remove the app from the device. Required by default.

Parameters.Name: ShortHelpText
Parameters.Description: Represents the customized short help text provided to users when they attempt to modify managed settings on their device.

Parameters.Name: StatusBarBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block access to the status bar, including notifications and quick settings.

Parameters.Name: StayOnModes
Parameters.Description: The battery plugged in modes for which the device stays on. When using this setting, it is recommended to clear the Time to lock screen setting so that the device doesn't lock itself while it stays on.

Parameters.Name: StorageAllowUsb
Parameters.Description: Allow USB storage.

Parameters.Name: StorageBlockExternalMedia
Parameters.Description: Block mounting of external media.

Parameters.Name: StorageBlockUsbFileTransfer
Parameters.Description: Block transfer of files over USB.

Parameters.Name: SystemUpdateFreezePeriods
Parameters.Description: Indicates the annually repeating time periods during which system updates are postponed. This collection can contain a maximum of 500 elements.

Parameters.Name: SystemUpdateInstallType
Parameters.Description: When over-the-air updates are available for this device, they will be installed based on this policy.?

Parameters.Name: SystemUpdateWindowEndMinutesAfterMidnight
Parameters.Description: End of the maintenance window in the device's time zone.?

Parameters.Name: SystemUpdateWindowStartMinutesAfterMidnight
Parameters.Description: Beginning of the maintenance window in the device's time zone.?

Parameters.Name: SystemWindowsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Disable window notifications such as toasts, incoming calls, outgoing calls, system alerts, and system errors.?

Parameters.Name: UsersBlockAdd
Parameters.Description: Blocks users from adding and signing in to personal accounts while on the device.

Parameters.Name: UsersBlockRemove
Parameters.Description: Block removal of users.

Parameters.Name: VolumeBlockAdjustment
Parameters.Description: Block changes to volume.

Parameters.Name: VpnAlwaysOnLockdownMode
Parameters.Description: Enabling this forces all network traffic through the VPN tunnel. If a connection to the VPN can't be established, no network traffic will be allowed.

Parameters.Name: VpnAlwaysOnPackageIdentifier
Parameters.Description: Android app package name for app that will handle an always-on VPN connection.

Parameters.Name: WifiBlockEditConfigurations
Parameters.Description: Block user creation or editing of any Wi-Fi configurations.

Parameters.Name: WifiBlockEditPolicyDefinedConfigurations
Parameters.Description: Block changes to Wi-Fi configurations created by the device owner. Users can create their own Wi-Fi configurations.

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordExpirationDays
Parameters.Description: Indicates the number of days that a work profile password can be set before it expires and a new password will be required. Valid values 1 to 365

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumLength
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum length of the work profile password. Valid values 4 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumLetterCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of numeric characters required for the work profile password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumLowerCaseCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of non-letter characters required for the work profile password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumNonLetterCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of letter characters required for the work profile password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumNumericCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of lower-case characters required for the work profile password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumSymbolCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of upper-case letter characters required for the work profile password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordMinimumUpperCaseCharacters
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum number of symbol characters required for the work profile password. Valid values 1 to 16

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordPreviousPasswordCountToBlock
Parameters.Description: Indicates the length of the work profile password history, where the user will not be able to enter a new password that is the same as any password in the history. Valid values 0 to 24

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordRequiredType
Parameters.Description: Indicates the minimum password quality required on the work profile password.

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordRequireUnlock
Parameters.Description: Indicates the timeout period after which a work profile must be unlocked using a form of strong authentication.

Parameters.Name: WorkProfilePasswordSignInFailureCountBeforeFactoryReset
Parameters.Description: Indicates the number of times a user can enter an incorrect work profile password before the device is wiped. Valid values 4 to 11

Parameters.Name: Assignments
Parameters.Description: Represents the assignment to the Intune policy.

Parameters.Name: Ensure
Parameters.Description: Present ensures the policy exists, absent ensures it is removed.

Parameters.Name: Credential
Parameters.Description: Credentials of the Intune Admin

Parameters.Name: ApplicationId
Parameters.Description: Id of the Azure Active Directory application to authenticate with.

Parameters.Name: TenantId
Parameters.Description: Id of the Azure Active Directory tenant used for authentication.

Parameters.Name: ApplicationSecret
Parameters.Description: Secret of the Azure Active Directory tenant used for authentication.

Parameters.Name: CertificateThumbprint
Parameters.Description: Thumbprint of the Azure Active Directory application's authentication certificate to use for authentication.

Parameters.Name: ManagedIdentity
Parameters.Description: Managed ID being used for authentication.

Parameters.Name: AccessTokens
Parameters.Description: Access token used for authentication.

Parameters.Name: WorkProfileAllowWidgets

Parameters.Name: WorkProfileBlockPersonalAppInstallsFromUnknownSources
Parameters.Description: Prevent app installations from unknown sources in the personal profile.

Description: This resource configures an Intune Device Configuration Policy for iOS.

Parameters.Name: cellularDataBlocked
Parameters.Description: If set to true, corresponding managed apps will not be allowed to use cellular data at any time.

Parameters.Name: cellularDataBlockWhenRoaming
Parameters.Description: If set to true, corresponding managed apps will not be allowed to use cellular data when roaming.

Parameters.Name: managedApps
Parameters.Description: Information about the managed apps that this rule is going to apply to.

Description: This resource configures an Intune Device Configuration Policy for iOS.

Parameters.Name: Id
Parameters.Description: Id of the Intune policy.

Parameters.Name: DisplayName
Parameters.Description: Display name of the Intune policy.

Parameters.Name: Description
Parameters.Description: Description of the Intune policy.

Parameters.Name: RoleScopeTagIds
Parameters.Description: List of Scope Tags for this Entity instance.

Parameters.Name: AccountBlockModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to allow account modification when the device is in supervised mode.

Parameters.Name: ActivationLockAllowWhenSupervised
Parameters.Description: Activation Lock makes it harder for a lost or stolen device to be reactivated.

Parameters.Name: AirDropBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to allow AirDrop when the device is in supervised mode.

Parameters.Name: AirDropForceUnmanagedDropTarget
Parameters.Description: Force AirDrop to be considered an unmanaged drop target.

Parameters.Name: AirPlayForcePairingPasswordForOutgoingRequests
Parameters.Description: Force requiring a pairing password for outgoing AirPlay requests.

Parameters.Name: AirPrintBlockCredentialsStorage
Parameters.Description: Blocks keychain storage of username and password for outgoing AirPrint request.

Parameters.Name: AirPrintBlocked
Parameters.Description: Blocks AirPrint request.

Parameters.Name: AirPrintBlockiBeaconDiscovery
Parameters.Description: Blocking prevents malicious AirPrint Bluetooth beacons phishing for network traffic.

Parameters.Name: AirPrintForceTrustedTLS
Parameters.Description: Forces trusted certificates for TLS printing communication

Parameters.Name: AppClipsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block app clips.

Parameters.Name: AppleNewsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block Apple News

Parameters.Name: ApplePersonalizedAdsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block Apple PersonalizedAdsBlocked

Parameters.Name: AppleWatchBlockPairing
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to allow Apple Watch pairing when the device is in supervised mode (iOS 9.0 and later).

Parameters.Name: AppleWatchForceWristDetection
Parameters.Description: Force paired Apple watch to use wrist detection.

Parameters.Name: AppRemovalBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block app removal.

Parameters.Name: AppsSingleAppModeList
Parameters.Description: Apps you add to this list and assign to a device can lock the device to run only that app once launched, or lock the device while a certain action is running (for example, taking a test). Once the action is complete, or you remove the restriction, the device returns to its normal state.

Parameters.Name: AppStoreBlockAutomaticDownloads
Parameters.Description: Blocks automatic downloading of apps purchased on other devices. Does not affect updates to existing apps.

Parameters.Name: AppStoreBlocked
Parameters.Description: For supervised devices as of iOS 13.0.

Parameters.Name: AppStoreBlockInAppPurchases
Parameters.Description: Block AppStore in-app purchases.

Parameters.Name: AppStoreBlockUIAppInstallation
Parameters.Description: Block App Store from Home Screen. Users may continue to use iTunes or Apple Configurator to install or update apps.

Parameters.Name: AppStoreRequirePassword
Parameters.Description: Users must enter Apple ID password for each in-app and iTunes purchase.

Parameters.Name: AppsVisibilityList
Parameters.Description: Enter the iTunes App Store URL of the app you want. For example, to specify the Microsoft Work Folders app for iOS, enter https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/work-folders/id950878067?mt=8. To find the URL of an app, use a search engine to locate the store page. For example, to find the Work Folders app, you could search Microsoft Work Folders ITunes.

Parameters.Name: AppsVisibilityListType
Parameters.Description: Set whether the list is a list of apps to hide or a list of apps to make visible.

Parameters.Name: AutoFillForceAuthentication
Parameters.Description: Require Touch ID or Face ID before passwords or credit card information can be auto filled in Safari and Apps. Available with iOS 12.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: AutoUnlockBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block auto unlock.

Parameters.Name: BlockSystemAppRemoval
Parameters.Description: Blocking disables the ability to remove system apps from the device.

Parameters.Name: BluetoothBlockModification
Parameters.Description: Block modification of Bluetooth settings. To use this setting, the device must be in supervised mode (iOS 10.0+).

Parameters.Name: CameraBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from accessing the camera of the device. Requires a supervised device for iOS 13 and later.

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockDataRoaming
Parameters.Description: Block data roaming over the cellular network. This won't show in the device's management profile, but a block will be enforced for data roaming every time the device checks in (typically every 8 hours).

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockGlobalBackgroundFetchWhileRoaming
Parameters.Description: Block global background fetch while roaming over the cellular network.

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockPerAppDataModification
Parameters.Description: Block changes to app cellular data usage settings.

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockPersonalHotspot
Parameters.Description: This value is available only with certain carriers. This won't show in the device's management profile, but a block will be enforced for personal hotspot every time the device checks in (typically every 8 hours). Block modification of personal hotspot in addition to this setting to ensure personal hotspot will always be blocked.

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockPersonalHotspotModification
Parameters.Description: For devices running iOS 12.2 and later. Users can't turn Personal Hotspot on or off. If you block this setting and block Personal Hotspot, Personal Hotspot will be turned off.

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockPlanModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to allow users to change the settings of the cellular plan on a supervised device.

Parameters.Name: CellularBlockVoiceRoaming
Parameters.Description: Block voice roaming over the cellular network.

Parameters.Name: CertificatesBlockUntrustedTlsCertificates
Parameters.Description: Block untrusted Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificates.

Parameters.Name: ClassroomAppBlockRemoteScreenObservation
Parameters.Description: Block remote screen observation by Classroom app. To use this setting, the device must be in supervised mode (iOS 9.3+).

Parameters.Name: ClassroomAppForceUnpromptedScreenObservation
Parameters.Description: Student devices enrolled in a class via the Classroom app will automatically give permission to that course's teacher to silently observe the student's screen.

Parameters.Name: ClassroomForceAutomaticallyJoinClasses
Parameters.Description: Students can join a class without prompting the teacher.

Parameters.Name: ClassroomForceRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses
Parameters.Description: Requires a student enrolled in an unmanaged course via Classroom to request permission from the teacher when attempting to leave the course. Only available in iOS 11.3+

Parameters.Name: ClassroomForceUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock
Parameters.Description: Teachers can lock an app open or lock the device without first prompting the user.

Parameters.Name: CompliantAppListType
Parameters.Description: Device compliance can be viewed in the Restricted Apps Compliance report.

Parameters.Name: CompliantAppsList
Parameters.Description: Enter the iTunes App Store URL of the app you want. For example, to specify the Microsoft Work Folders app for iOS, enter https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/work-folders/id950878067?mt=8. To find the URL of an app, use a search engine to locate the store page. For example, to find the Work Folders app, you could search Microsoft Work Folders ITunes.

Parameters.Name: ConfigurationProfileBlockChanges
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from installing configuration profiles and certificates interactively when the device is in supervised mode.

Parameters.Name: ContactsAllowManagedToUnmanagedWrite
Parameters.Description: Users can sync and add their managed contacts (including business and corporate ones) to an unmanaged app, such as the device's built-in contacts app.

Parameters.Name: ContactsAllowUnmanagedToManagedRead
Parameters.Description: An unmanaged app, such as the device's built-in contacts app, can access contact info in a managed app, such as Outlook.

Parameters.Name: ContinuousPathKeyboardBlocked
Parameters.Description: QuickPath enables continuous input on the device keyboard. Available for iOS/iPadOS 13.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: DateAndTimeForceSetAutomatically
Parameters.Description: Forces device to Set Date & Time Automatically. The device's time zone will only be updated when the device has cellular connections or wifi with location services enabled.

Parameters.Name: DefinitionLookupBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block definition lookup when the device is in supervised mode (iOS 8.1.3 and later ).

Parameters.Name: DeviceBlockEnableRestrictions
Parameters.Description: On iOS 12.0 and later, this blocks users from setting their own Screen Time settings, which includes device restrictions. On iOS 11.4.1 and earlier, this blocks the user from enabling restrictions in the device settings. The blocking effect is the same on any supervised iOS device.

Parameters.Name: DeviceBlockEraseContentAndSettings
Parameters.Description: Block the use of the erase all content and settings option on the device.

Parameters.Name: DeviceBlockNameModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to allow device name modification when the device is in supervised mode (iOS 9.0 and later).

Parameters.Name: DiagnosticDataBlockSubmission
Parameters.Description: Block the device from sending diagnostic and usage telemetry data.

Parameters.Name: DiagnosticDataBlockSubmissionModification
Parameters.Description: Block the modification of the diagnostic submission and app analytics settings in the Diagnostics and Usage pane in Settings. To use this setting, the device must be in supervised mode (iOS 9.3.2+).

Parameters.Name: DocumentsBlockManagedDocumentsInUnmanagedApps
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from viewing managed documents in unmanaged apps.

Parameters.Name: DocumentsBlockUnmanagedDocumentsInManagedApps
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from viewing unmanaged documents in managed apps.

Parameters.Name: EmailInDomainSuffixes
Parameters.Description: Emails that the user sends or receives which don't match the domains you specify here will be marked as untrusted.

Parameters.Name: EnterpriseAppBlockTrust
Parameters.Description: Removes the Trust Enterprise Developer button in Settings->General->Profiles & Device Management.

Parameters.Name: EnterpriseAppBlockTrustModification
Parameters.Description: Block the changing of enterprise app trust settings.

Parameters.Name: EnterpriseBookBlockBackup
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to backup enterprise book.

Parameters.Name: EnterpriseBookBlockMetadataSync
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to sync enterprise book metadata.

Parameters.Name: EsimBlockModification
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to allow the addition or removal of cellular plans on the eSIM of a supervised device.

Parameters.Name: FaceTimeBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from using FaceTime. Requires a supervised device for iOS 13 and later.

Parameters.Name: FilesNetworkDriveAccessBlocked
Parameters.Description: Using the Server Message Block (SMB) protocol, devices can access files or other resources on a network server. Available for devices running iOS and iPadOS, versions 13.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: FilesUsbDriveAccessBlocked
Parameters.Description: Devices with access can connect to and open files on a USB drive. Available for devices running iOS and iPadOS, versions 13.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: FindMyDeviceInFindMyAppBlocked
Parameters.Description: A Find My app feature. Available for iOS/iPadOS 13.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: FindMyFriendsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block changes to the Find My Friends app settings.

Parameters.Name: FindMyFriendsInFindMyAppBlocked
Parameters.Description: A Find My app feature. Used to locate family and friends from an Apple device or iCloud.com. Available for iOS/iPadOS 13.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: GameCenterBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from using Game Center when the device is in supervised mode.

Parameters.Name: GamingBlockGameCenterFriends
Parameters.Description: Block adding Game Center friends. For supervised devices as of iOS 13.0.

Parameters.Name: GamingBlockMultiplayer
Parameters.Description: For supervised devices as of iOS 13.0.

Parameters.Name: HostPairingBlocked
Parameters.Description: Host pairing allows you to control which devices the device can pair with.

Parameters.Name: IBooksStoreBlocked
Parameters.Description: Indicates whether or not to block the user from using the iBooks Store when the device is in supervised mode.

Parameters.Name: IBooksStoreBlockErotica
Parameters.Description: User will not be able to download media from the iBook store that has been tagged as erotica.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockActivityContinuation
Parameters.Description: Handoff lets users start work on one iOS device, and continue it on another MacOS or iOS device.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockBackup
Parameters.Description: Block backing up device to iCloud.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockDocumentSync
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing documents and data.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockManagedAppsSync
Parameters.Description: Block managed apps from syncing to cloud.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockPhotoLibrary
Parameters.Description: Any photos not fully downloaded from iCloud Photo Library to device will be removed from local storage.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockPhotoStreamSync
Parameters.Description: Block photo stream syncing to iCloud.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockSharedPhotoStream

Parameters.Description: Block passcode from being added, changed or removed. Changes to passcode restrictions will be ignored on supervised devices after blocking passcode modification.

Parameters.Description: Block simple password sequences, such as 1234 or 1111.

Parameters.Name: PasscodeMinutesOfInactivityBeforeScreenTimeout

Parameters.Name: PasscodePreviousPasscodeBlockCount
Parameters.Description: Number of new passwords that must be used until an old one can be reused. (1-24)

Parameters.Name: PasscodeSignInFailureCountBeforeWipe
Parameters.Description: Number of consecutive times an incorrect password can be entered before device is wiped of all data. (2-11)

Parameters.Name: WifiPowerOnForced
Parameters.Description: Wi-Fi can't be turned off in the Settings app or in the Control Center, even when the device is in airplane mode. Available for iOS/iPadOS 13.0 and later.

Description: This resource configures an Intune device configuration profile for an MacOS Device.

Parameters.Name: accessibility
Parameters.Description: Allow the app or process to control the Mac via the Accessibility subsystem.

Parameters.Name: addressBook
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to contact information managed by Contacts.

Parameters.Name: appleEventsAllowedReceivers
Parameters.Description: Allow or deny the app or process to send a restricted Apple event to another app or process. You will need to know the identifier, identifier type, and code requirement of the receiving app or process.

Parameters.Name: blockCamera
Parameters.Description: Block access to camera app.

Parameters.Name: blockListenEvent
Parameters.Description: Block the app or process from listening to events from input devices such as mouse, keyboard, and trackpad.Requires macOS 10.15 or later.

Parameters.Name: blockMicrophone
Parameters.Description: Block access to microphone.

Parameters.Name: blockScreenCapture
Parameters.Description: Block app from capturing contents of system display. Requires macOS 10.15 or later.

Parameters.Name: calendar
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to event information managed by Calendar.

Parameters.Name: codeRequirement
Parameters.Description: Enter the code requirement, which can be obtained with the command 'codesign -display -r -' in the Terminal app. Include everything after '=>'.

Parameters.Name: displayName
Parameters.Description: The display name of the app, process, or executable.

Parameters.Name: fileProviderPresence
Parameters.Description: Allow the app or process to access files managed by another app's file provider extension. Requires macOS 10.15 or later.

Parameters.Name: identifier
Parameters.Description: The bundle ID or path of the app, process, or executable.

Parameters.Name: identifierType
Parameters.Description: A bundle ID is used to identify an app. A path is used to identify a process or executable.

Parameters.Name: mediaLibrary
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to music and the media library.

Parameters.Name: photos
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to images managed by Photos.

Parameters.Name: postEvent
Parameters.Description: Control access to CoreGraphics APIs, which are used to send CGEvents to the system event stream.

Parameters.Name: reminders
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to information managed by Reminders.

Parameters.Name: speechRecognition
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to system speech recognition facility.

Parameters.Name: staticCodeValidation
Parameters.Description: Statically validates the code requirement. Use this setting if the process invalidates its dynamic code signature.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicyAllFiles
Parameters.Description: Control access to all protected files on a device. Files might be in locations such as emails, messages, apps, and administrative settings. Apply this setting with caution.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicyDesktopFolder
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to Desktop folder.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicyDocumentsFolder
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to Documents folder.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicyDownloadsFolder
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to Downloads folder.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicyNetworkVolumes
Parameters.Description: Allow or block access to network volumes. Requires macOS 10.15 or later.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicyRemovableVolumes
Parameters.Description: Control access to removable volumes on the device, such as an external hard drive. Requires macOS 10.15 or later.

Parameters.Name: systemPolicySystemAdminFiles
Parameters.Description: Allow app or process to access files used in system administration.

Parameters.Name: CameraBlocked
Parameters.Description: Blocks users from taking photographs and videos.

Parameters.Description: Unprompted observation means that teachers can view screens without warning students first. This setting isn't available if you've blocked screenshots.

Parameters.Name: ClassroomForceAutomaticallyJoinClasses
Parameters.Description: Students can join a class without prompting the teacher.

Parameters.Name: ClassroomForceRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses
Parameters.Description: Students enrolled in an unmanaged Classroom course must get teacher consent to leave the course.

Parameters.Name: ClassroomForceUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock
Parameters.Description: Teachers can lock a student's device or app without the student's approval.

Parameters.Description: List of apps in the compliance (either allow list or block list, controlled by CompliantAppListType).

Parameters.Name: ContentCachingBlocked
Parameters.Description: Configures whether or not to allow content caching.

Parameters.Name: DefinitionLookupBlocked
Parameters.Description: Block look up, a feature that looks up the definition of a highlighted word.

Parameters.Name: EmailInDomainSuffixes
Parameters.Description: Emails that the user sends or receives which don't match the domains you specify here will be marked as untrusted.

Parameters.Name: EraseContentAndSettingsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Configures the reset option on supervised devices. Available for devices running macOS versions 12.0 and later.

Parameters.Name: GameCenterBlocked
Parameters.Description: Configured if the Game Center icon is removed from the Home screen. Available for devices running macOS versions 10.13 and later.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockActivityContinuation

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockAddressBook
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing contacts.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockBookmarks
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing bookmarks.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockCalendar
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing calendars.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockDocumentSync
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing documents and data.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockMail
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing mail.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockNotes
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing notes.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockPhotoLibrary
Parameters.Description: Any photos not fully downloaded from iCloud Photo Library to device will be removed from local storage.

Parameters.Name: ICloudBlockReminders
Parameters.Description: Blocks iCloud from syncing reminders.

Parameters.Name: ICloudDesktopAndDocumentsBlocked
Parameters.Description: Configures if the synchronization of cloud desktop and documents is blocked. Available for devices running macOS 10.12.4 and later.

Parameters.Name: ICloudPrivateRelayBlocked
Parameters.Description: Configures if iCloud private relay is blocked or not. Available for devices running macOS 12 and later.

Parameters.Description: Configures  whether or not to block files from being transferred using iTunes.

Parameters.Name: KeyboardBlockDictation
Parameters.Description: Block dictation, which is a feature that converts the user's voice to text.

Parameters.Name: KeychainBlockCloudSync
Parameters.Description: Disables syncing credentials stored in the Keychain to iCloud

Parameters.Name: MultiplayerGamingBlocked
Parameters.Description: Configures whether multiplayer gaming when using Game Center is blocked. Available for devices running macOS versions 10.13 and later.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockAirDropSharing
Parameters.Description: Configures whether or not to block sharing passwords with the AirDrop passwords feature.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockAutoFill
Parameters.Description: Configures whether or not to block the AutoFill Passwords feature.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockFingerprintUnlock
Parameters.Description: Requires user to set a non-biometric passcode or password to unlock the device.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockModification
Parameters.Description: Blocks user from changing the set passcode.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockProximityRequests
Parameters.Description: Configures whether or not to block requesting passwords from nearby devices.

Parameters.Name: PasswordBlockSimple
Parameters.Description: Block simple password sequences, such as 1234 or 1111.

Parameters.Description: Number of days until device password must be changed. (1-65535)

Parameters.Description: Minimum number (0-4) of non-alphanumeric characters, such as #, %, !, etc., required in the password. The default value is 0.

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinimumLength
Parameters.Description: Minimum number of digits or characters in password (4-16).

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeLock
Parameters.Description: Set to 0 to require a password immediately. There is no maximum number of minutes, and this number overrides the number currently set on the device.

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeScreenTimeout
Parameters.Description: Set to 0 to use the device's minimum possible value. This number (0-60 minutes) overrides the number currently set on the device.

Parameters.Name: PasswordMinutesUntilFailedLoginReset
Parameters.Description: Configures the number of minutes before the login is reset after the maximum number of unsuccessful login attempts is reached.

Parameters.Name: PasswordPreviousPasswordBlockCount
Parameters.Description: Number of new passwords that must be used until an old one can be reused. (1-24)

Parameters.Description: Specify the type of password required.
